exploration_notes: Found the complete CODEOWNERS infrastructure across 5 categories: (1) `.github/CODEOWNERS` — the GitHub ownership definition file. (2) `.github/workflows/codeowners-validator.yml` — CI workflow that validates CODEOWNERS. (3) Five JavaScript manifest generation scripts under `scripts/codeowners-manifest/` (`index.js` orchestrator, `generate.js` for processing raw audit into JSON manifests, `raw.js` for running github-codeowners CLI audit, `metadata.js` for cache hashing, and `constants.js` for sh
